description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: From your account portal, make a one-time payment of your full current balance scheduled for today using any active saved credit card.
tasks.name: From your account portal, make a one-time payment of your full current balance scheduled for today using any active saved credit card.
tasks.description: From your account portal, make a one-time payment of your full current balance scheduled for today using any active saved credit card.

tasks.instruction: Turn on auto-pay for your primary billing account so the total statement balance is automatically paid 3 days before each due date using any eligible saved bank account.
tasks.name: Turn on auto-pay for your primary billing account so the total statement balance is automatically paid 3 days before each due date using any eligible saved bank account.
tasks.description: Turn on auto-pay for your primary billing account so the total statement balance is automatically paid 3 days before each due date using any eligible saved bank account.

tasks.instruction: Change your home internet service to the fastest available internet-only plan that costs no more than $80 per month and provides at least 300 Mbps download speeds.
tasks.name: Change your home internet service to the fastest available internet-only plan that costs no more than $80 per month and provides at least 300 Mbps download speeds.
tasks.description: Change your home internet service to the fastest available internet-only plan that costs no more than $80 per month and provides at least 300 Mbps download speeds.

tasks.instruction: Add a TV streaming add-on to your account by selecting the lowest-priced streaming package under $25 per month that includes at least 50 channels.
tasks.name: Add a TV streaming add-on to your account by selecting the lowest-priced streaming package under $25 per month that includes at least 50 channels.
tasks.description: Add a TV streaming add-on to your account by selecting the lowest-priced streaming package under $25 per month that includes at least 50 channels.

tasks.instruction: Update the primary Wi‑Fi network for your home gateway by changing its network name (SSID) to "GreenHome_5G" and its Wi‑Fi password to "SecurePass!45", keeping the default security type.
tasks.name: Update the primary Wi‑Fi network for your home gateway by changing its network name (SSID) to "GreenHome_5G" and its Wi‑Fi password to "SecurePass!45", keeping the default security type.
tasks.description: Update the primary Wi‑Fi network for your home gateway by changing its network name (SSID) to "GreenHome_5G" and its Wi‑Fi password to "SecurePass!45", keeping the default security type.

tasks.instruction: Update your notification settings so that service outage alerts are sent by SMS to your mobile number, billing reminders are sent only by email (with SMS and push disabled for billing), promotional messages are turned off for both email and SMS, and the global notification frequency is set to the standard/default level.
tasks.name: Update your notification settings so that service outage alerts are sent by SMS to your mobile number, billing reminders are sent only by email (with SMS and push disabled for billing), promotional messages are turned off for both email and SMS, and the global notification frequency is set to the standard/default level.
tasks.description: Update your notification settings so that service outage alerts are sent by SMS to your mobile number, billing reminders are sent only by email (with SMS and push disabled for billing), promotional messages are turned off for both email and SMS, and the global notification frequency is set to the standard/default level.

tasks.instruction: Create a data usage alert on your 1 TB home internet plan that triggers when 800 GB of data have been used in the current cycle and sends notifications via both email and SMS.
tasks.name: Create a data usage alert on your 1 TB home internet plan that triggers when 800 GB of data have been used in the current cycle and sends notifications via both email and SMS.
tasks.description: Create a data usage alert on your 1 TB home internet plan that triggers when 800 GB of data have been used in the current cycle and sends notifications via both email and SMS.

tasks.instruction: Schedule a technician visit for a slow internet issue at your home by booking the earliest available morning appointment (starting between 8:00 AM and 12:00 PM) within the next 5 calendar days, and set the contact phone number to "555-987-6543" with a note saying "Connection frequently drops in the evenings".

target_names: Home Morning Slot 9–11 AM on the 3rd

expected_values.notes: Connection frequently drops in the evenings

tasks.instruction: From the equipment section, rent a Wi‑Fi 6 router by selecting the cheapest available router with Wi‑Fi 6 support that has a monthly rental price under $12 and choosing the self-install shipping option.
